zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Gresley於大約1127年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德拉可洛福時，他的父親William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley34歲，母親Elena de Stafford33歲。他於大約1150年與Basilla de Drakelow在英國德比夏爾德拉可洛福結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1183年之後在英國英格蘭德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾邱奇 格萊斯利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gresley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Greasley
meanings: 1  English: locative name, usually from Greasley (Notts) but possibly also from Gresley (Derbys). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2), particularly the Lancs examples.

2 Norman, English: nickname, either from Old French greslet ‘marked as by hail’, i.e. pitted or pock-marked, or Old French greslet, gresli, grailet ‘thin, slim’. In early forms, the nickname has sometimes been confused with the place-name in (1). Compare Le Gresley in Jersey and Greslé, Grêlé in France.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Gresley was born about 1127, in Drakelow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley, was 34 and his mother, Elena de Stafford, was 33. He married Basilla de Drakelow about 1150, in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1183, in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Gresley est né environ 1127, à Drakelow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elena de Stafford, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Basilla de Drakelow environ 1150, à Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1183, à Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1150 in Drakelowe, Derbyshire, England Basilla de Drakelow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1183 in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Church Gresley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Gresleyが約1127年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウで生まれた時，父William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresleyは34歳，母Elena de Staffordは33歳であった。約1150年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアドラケロウでBasilla de Drakelowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1183年以後にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ グレスリーで死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチャーチ グレスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Burton on Trent St Modwen, Staffordshire: 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버턴 업 트렌트
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Gresley(이)가 대략 1127년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 드라켈로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Elena de Stafford(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 영국 더비실르 드라켈로에서 Basilla de Drakelow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1183년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 c후르치 그레슬리에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 c후르치 그레슬리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Gresley nasceu aproximadamente 1127, em Drakelow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Elena de Stafford, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Basilla de Drakelow aproximadamente 1150, em Drakelowe, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1183, em Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Church Gresley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Burton on Trent St Modwen, Staffordshire: буртон упон трент, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Gresley родился около 1127 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William FitzNigel de Stafford de Gresley было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elena de Stafford, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Basilla de Drakelow около 1150 г. в местности дрекелоу, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1183 г. в местности чурч гресли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности чурч гресли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
